{{Quote|Look out! He's moving!|Final words of the technician|<ref name="Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88">{{StoryCite|story=Therefore I Am: The Tale of IG-88|book=Tales of the Bounty Hunters}}</ref>}}
An unnamed [[Human/Legends|Human]] technician, identified by [[IG-88A/Legends|IG-88A]] only as '''Target Number One''', was the first person killed by the [[Assassin droid/Legends|assassin droid]]. The technician, employed by [[Holowan Laboratories/Legends|Holowan Laboratories]], was one of several scientists assigned to [[Project Phlutdroid/Legends|Project Phlutdroid]]. Selected as IG-88's first target because he was the first to attempt to activate the emergency alarm, the technician died when IG-88 threw a disconnected droid arm into his back, smashing his spinal cord and his heart.
